titleStmt.title: SII 25.173: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 173. (A.R. No. 173 of 1908.) TIRUNAṞAIYŪR, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Siddhanāthasvāmi temple.
This incomplete inscription commences with the praśasti, Pūmaruviyatirumādum, etc., of the king.

It records the grant of taxable lands at Tirunaṟaiyūr alias Pañchavaṉmādēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam and at Ediriliśōḻamaṅgalam for the worship and offerings to the deity Siddhīśvaram-uḍaiyār of Tirunaṟaiyūr in Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. It was probably entrusted to the dēvakaṉmi and the śrīmāhēśvara-kaṇkāṇi-cheyvār of the temple. One of the lands thus given belong to the kāṇi of Vikramaśōḻa-brahmārāyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmaruviya tirumātum puvimātum jayamātum nāmaruviya kalaimātum pukaḻmātum nayantu pulka varumuṟai vitineṟi vaḷarttum taḻaippa varumu
ṟai Urimai maṇimuṭi cūṭit tiṅkaḷ veṇkuṭait ticaikkeḷuṟeṭṭumRead ticaikaḷireṭṭumtaṅku taṉikkūṭantāṉ Eṉa viḷaṅka karuṅkalippaṭṭiyaic ceṅkOl turappa ponka
tirāram puli vaḷarttuṭaṉ varavillavar Iraṭṭar maṉṉavar ciṅkaḷar pallavar nutaliyar pāttivar paṇiya Eṇṇaruṅ kaṟpiṟ maṇṇakam puṇarntu cempon
siṅhāsanattu puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya (kopara) koparakesaripaṟmarāna tiripuvanac cakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu
Oṉpatāvatu trabhuvaṉatribhuvaṉa śakkaravattikonerinmai koṇṭāṉ kulottuṅka coḻavaḷanāṭṭu tirunaṟaiyūr nā
ṭṭu tirunaṟaiyūr cittiycirama tevakaṉmikkum cimāhecurak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum Ittevaṟku veṇ
ṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka tirunaṟaiyūrāṉa pañcavaṉmātevi caruppetimaṅkalam veṟupiṟinta nilam nikki tiṟappāṉa nilattu I
t tevar Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyili m puñce Iraṇṭu māmukkāṇi muntirikai kiḻ Orumāvarai muntirikaiyum vikkirama coḻa
brammarāyaṉ kāṇiyāy Ivvūril niṉṟum veṟupiṟinta Etirili coḻamaṅkalattu tiṟappu nilattu Ittevar Ūrkkiḻ Iṟai
pottakapaṭi nilam Araiye nālumāvaraiyiṉ kiḻ Araiye Orumā mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyum Ittevarkku Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭuRest of the record is lost.
Digital edition of SII 25.173 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
